overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking along a lakeside dirt path at night, approaching and crossing a wooden pier over the water. The scene features artificial lighting from street lamps, mountainous backdrop, and transitions from open shoreline to narrow pier structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside dirt path with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the shoreline toward a fenced pier entrance, carrying a backpack and rifle

entered.detail: large boulder formation beside the path
calm lake water reflecting the night sky
distant mountain silhouette against the night sky
tall wooden utility pole with bright lamp illuminating the path
dense evergreen trees covering the hillside
small blue corrugated metal building near the fence line
stacked sandbags forming a low wall near the pier entrance
metal chain-link fence gate leading to the wooden pier

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide dirt path beside a lake at night, illuminated by street lamps. Large rocks and sparse vegetation line the path as the character approaches a fenced pier entrance with sandbag barricades and a blue metal shed visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier extending over lake water with barbed wire railings

events.description: character passes through chain-link gate and steps from dirt onto wooden pier planks

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow wooden pier over the water, heading toward the distant forested shore

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the pier walkway over the water
wooden railing along the left side of the pier
wooden railing along the right side wrapped with barbed wire
coils of barbed wire wrapped around the right side railing

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a narrow wooden pier extending over the lake, passing through a chain-link gate. The pier features weathered wooden planks and railings wrapped with barbed wire, illuminated by overhead street lamps. Water surrounds both sides of the pier as the character walks toward a distant forested hill.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide lakeside dirt path toward the narrow confines of a wooden pier at night. It begins with the character walking along the shoreline under the glow of street lamps, passing large rocks and sparse vegetation. As the character approaches a fenced entrance marked by sandbag barricades and a blue metal shed, the path narrows and shifts from earth to weathered wooden planks. The scene then expands over the dark water as the character passes through a chain-link gate onto the pier, moving beneath overhead lights and past railings wrapped in barbed wire. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper onto the structure, heading toward a distant forested hill.
